name: Older-adult fecal microbiota transplantation case review for Clostridium difficile infection
summary: Case review of fecal microbiota transplantation recipients aged 65 or older treated for Clostridium difficile infection at Emory University Hospital, with resolution, serious adverse events, deaths, and reported adverse-event follow-up.
population: Adults aged 65 years or older treated with FMT for Clostridium difficile infection
